title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Natco Pharma South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Natco Pharma South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Natco Pharma South Asia Partners:
Natco Pharma South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma South Asia Partners!
